APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT LUGNASIN, CHONA B. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

SETT CONF: IRVING PFEFFER, JPT; DAN MACDUFF, CLERK: BELDON YEE, CSR. PLTF AURORA ESCALONA APPEARS WITH ATTY HARRISON T. NAM. DEFT APPEARS, IN PRO PER. THE CASE SETTLES AS FOLLOWS: DEFT TO VACATE BY 11:59 PM ON 9/15/01; PLTF TO PAY DEFT $2,000 MOVING EXP'S - TO BE SENT FEDEX BY 5 PM ON 7/11/01. MUTUAL WAIVER OF RIGHTS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE AS ABOVE, PLTF MAY SEEK JUDGMENT EX PARTE, INCLUDING $1,242.15 BACK RENT, OTHERWISE DAMAGES WAIVED BY PLTF. DEFT'S DEPOSIT TO BE RETURNED TO HER + INT, WHEN SHE VACATES. DEFT TO LEAVE THE PREMISES IN BROOM-CLEAN CONDITION; ANY OF DEFT'S PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND BECOMES PLTF'S PROPERTY. IF DEFT COMPLIES WITH ABOVE, PLFT WILL DISMISS THIS ACTION + ANY RELATED RENT- BOARD ACTION. PLTF'S CSL TO PREPARE AN ORDER.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BEST, THOMAS G SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR LUGNASIN, CHONA B.
